product_highlights: Avobenzone - broad-spectrum UVA protector covering UVA I and UVA II wavelengths (310-400 nm)
Comprehensive UV filter portfolio for cosmetic and sunscreen formulations
US-based supply for personal care manufacturers
notes: Adeline Chemicals is a US-based personal care ingredient supplier offering a focused portfolio of UV filter raw materials including avobenzone for UVA sun protection. Their avobenzone offering covers UVA I and UVA II wavelengths (310-400 nm), providing comprehensive UVA protection for topical sunscreen and cosmetic formulations. Adeline Chemicals supports cosmetic manufacturers with consistent supply of FDA OTC-compliant sunscreen active ingredients; UVB filters such as octinoxate or octocrylene should be paired for full broad-spectrum coverage.
